modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to install Greenshot for work due to Printkey2000 issues.

full_description_text:  
The user called in wanting Greenshot installed on their computer. They mentioned that Printkey2000 isn’t working properly at all. It seems they really need Greenshot for their work tasks. They just want to get it set up so they can continue with their work smoothly.
short_description: Request to install Greenshot for work due to Printkey2000 issues.
description: The user called in wanting Greenshot installed on their computer. They mentioned that Printkey2000 isn’t working properly at all. It seems they really need Greenshot for their work tasks. They just want to get it set up so they can continue with their work smoothly.
